text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I return from an outing with Mejiro Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: There you are, Ryan! Hurry, hurry, get over here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-what's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin suddenly appears and drags Mejiro
Ryan away. I rush after them to see what's up.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hey, everyone! I found Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Nice work, Ines! Quick, Ryan, get on the court!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What's this? A volleyball match?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's right! We're having an interclass match. It's
been a real back-and-forth game!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And you're here just in time to be our surprise
pinch server!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: W-well, I don't really know how well I'll do...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But if you need me, then I gotta try! Gimme a
moment!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm ready. Let's resume the match!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Gooo, Ryan! Ace that serve!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll do what I can! Don't hold back the
cheers!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Here we go! Concentrate...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You can always count on Ryan to get into it,
hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whistle sounds, and Mejiro Ryan launches her
serve...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwack!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Not only did you ace the serve, you showed off
some great offense and defense after!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd nail it! You're a real-life goddess of victory! Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
For real! What a great idea it was to bring you
into the game!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, glad to hear it!
choice_data_list: I'm proud to be your trainer!
I'm proud to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha, glad to hear it!
choice_data_list: I'm proud to be your trainer!
I'm proud to be your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Of course she is! Ryan's our inspiration—loved by
all!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Ryan's our hero!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's a little embarrassing to hear, but...
thanks! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best not to let anyone down!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even as an unexpected substitute, Mejiro Ryan's
active presence makes it obvious why she's so
popular.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much! Hehe, I think I'm blushing...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! Your trainer's pretty bold to say that in
front of everyone!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Whistle! Right, guys?

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Whistle! Yeah! We all heard it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
What?! N-no, it's not like that! Give us a break
here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by her classmates, Mejiro Ryan is a
bit embarrassed, but it's clear she's popular as
someone they can depend on.
